ideation: This animation sequence portrays a gentle, peaceful dove.  The arms will mimic the wings of a dove, starting in a relaxed position and then extending outward in a slow, graceful motion.  The sequence will finish with the arms returning to a relaxed state.  The movements will be smooth and deliberate, emphasizing the tranquility associated with doves.  I'll make use of both joint1 (roll) and joint2 (pitch) for a natural wing-like motion. The wrists will remain neutral to avoid unnecessary complexity.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready for flight
wings begin to lift and spread outwards
arms extend fully, like a dove in flight
arms return to rest, peace is found
